pass1_value.note: The OAuth quickstart shows developers register an app in the Copper developer dashboard to obtain client_id and client_secret (self-serve). The public pricing page indicates Copper offers free trials / 'Start free, no credit card required' (https://www.copper.com/pricing), but no official page explicitly states API access is available on the free plan, so classification is medium confidence.

final_value.note: OAuth QuickStart states you can "register your app in our Developer Dashboard" (login and click “Create”), after which Copper generates a client_id and client_secret—indicating self-serve credential issuance. However, this page does not explicitly confirm that API access is included on a free plan (it describes registration/credentials, not plan entitlements), so confidence remains medium.
